additional_rules.description: Cronus Home Run agency program with CRA overlays. Property must be in FFIEC-designated LMI census tract. Conforming loan amounts only, no high-balance or jumbo. Fixed rate only, no MI, no temporary buydown.
additional_rules.alternative_income_path: Borrower income ≤80% of area MFI can also qualify (not verifiable from property data)
additional_rules.counseling_required: Required unless homeowner in past 3 years
additional_rules.no_current_property: Borrower and non-borrowing spouse cannot own any residential property at closing

general_notes: Cronus Home Run (GMCC Grandslam) is a conforming agency program with CRA pricing overlays.
Two qualifying paths: (a) Borrower income ≤80% of MSA MFI, OR (b) Property in FFIEC-designated LMI census tract. Only path (b) is verifiable from property data.
Conforming loan amounts only — no high-balance or jumbo. Fixed rate only. No MI.
Purchase only. Primary residence only. 1-2 units. Max LTV 97%.
Wage earner only — self-employed borrowers do not qualify.
Borrower AND non-borrowing spouse cannot own any residential property at time of closing.
Counseling program required unless homeowner in past 3 years.
VA residual income test required. No non-occupant co-borrower.
